26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Pigminted made this Wheel of Time book holder. Check out their posts for more cool stuff.
27 Man Tax: Tim Robbins
“The only people who see the whole picture are the ones who step outside the frame.” - Salman Rushdie So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: I just can't stop smiling watching this!
item.description: This throwback moment comes from 2008, when Curtis Lahti proposed to Linda Bazalaki—former Miss Uganda—during a Seattle Mariners game. The proposal appeared on the jumbotron, and her joyful, unscripted reaction instantly became part of early viral internet history.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: RHM :)
item.description: Patrick is a 34-year-old orangutan at the Metro Richmond Zoo. To celebrate his birthday, the zoo gifted him a royal cloak, which he tied neatly on his own.

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.33 INHALE EXHALE
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Chen Sen
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Carry On - Jungle YouTube: https://youtu.be/HqMRbHy1q7w?si=W6L0k75AAftlcXxW Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5SHtU2P8fASB2tjdOh1jMc?si=ed77785952b94615
DOFRESH
Martin Bonnevier
Sergey Vasnev
Clément De Ruyter
Olga Gobernik Kon
Sora Kim
Richard Nadler
Alan Daniels
Will Murai
Wenjun Lin
Gilles Bachelet
Yoshiyuki Takani
Elementton
Ian Su
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
I want to thank you all for your patience while I stepped away for a little while. I’m still terribly beside myself with the loss of my best friend, Pathos. Near the end of his life, his world grew dim and distant. His eyes failed him. His ears followed. But even then, there was this small, defiant ritual he held onto. He would go outside, lift his head to the sky, and bark. Loud, triumphant, unashamed. His tail wagging with everything he had left, like a drumbeat against the quiet. It wasn’t confusion. It wasn’t noise. It was a declaration. I’m still here. I still count. I think about that a lot now. Because I suppose that’s what this is. Not a return to normal, not even a step forward. Just a voice, a little worn, a little unsteady, cast upward into the open air. A small, stubborn act of being. Me, barking at the sky, trying to keep my light on… and hoping it’s enough to let you know I’m still here.
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: You can't be an ally and still consume media from a bad person

Luna, the feral cat that took a month to domesticate ~u/newtonthedog
In 1949, Japanese school children have written to then Prime Minister of India asking for an elephant because Japan has lost its only two elephants during the war. Nehru granted the request.
Master of camouflage and trickery ~u/9VoltGorilla

item.title: GovBrief Today #424
item.description: The profit taking is open now. Dwight Eisenhower warned the country about the military-industrial complex in his 1961 farewell address. He probably never imagined the defense secretary would try to profit from it weeks before a war. The Financial Times reported that Pete Hegseth's broker tried to invest millions of dollars in the defense fund holding Lockheed Martin and Northrop Grumman, among others. The investment didn't go through only because the fund wasn't available for purchase yet. Days later, Hegseth gave the order to attack Iran. The Army launched a review today after Apache helicopters from the 101st Airborne performed a flyby of Kid Rock's Nashville estate. Kid Rock posted two videos of himself poolside, saluting them. In Florida, Governor DeSantis signed a bill renaming Palm Beach International Airport after Trump, with a proposed new airport code of DJT. Trump's private company had already trademarked the name weeks earlier, giving the president's family business the right to collect licensing fees on everything from shuttle buses to flight suits, for an airport the state of Florida renamed as a gift. Cronyism and grift have always been part of politics, but never quite so openly or greedily. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand they stop the profit taking. Put their votes on the record. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 424 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260330-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-detroit-hezbollah [2] https://go.govbrief.today/tanker-attacked [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar30 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/epa-hazard-sites [5] https://go.govbrief.today/bianco-probe-halted [6] https://go.govbrief.today/kidrock-helo [7] https://go.govbrief.today/swalwell-fbi-letter [8] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-trans-athletes [9] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-profiteering [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-airport [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-epstein-toilet Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
